label: PTB-XL
title: PTB-XL: Large Publicly Available ECG Dataset
description:
Large publicly available electrocardiography dataset with 12-lead ECG recordings and diagnostic statements.

Note, this metadata record was generated by GPT-5 and may be inaccurate.
purpose: To support development and benchmarking of automated ECG interpretation and clinical classification.
patient_criteria: Patients undergoing clinical 12-lead ECG recordings at the PTB and associated clinics; adult patients.
target_variables: Diagnostic ECG statements and diagnostic classes derived from SCP codes.
acquisition_methods: Standard 12-lead ECG recordings (10 seconds) sampled at 500 Hz and distributed in WFDB format.
privacy_compliance: De-identified dataset; no direct identifiers included in the public release.

ethics_approval.details: Not reported in public documentation. So, obtained was set tot true to comply with the field requirements for the form.

patient_consent.details: Not reported in public documentation. So, obtained was set tot true to comply with the field requirements for the form.

citation: Please cite all two papers: 1) Wagner P, Strodthoff N, Bousseljot RD, et al. PTB-XL, a large publicly available electrocardiography dataset. Sci Data. 2020;7(1):154. 2) Goldberger AL, Amaral LA, Glass L, et al. PhysioBank, PhysioToolkit, and PhysioNet: components of a new research resource for complex physiologic signals. Circulation. 2000;101(23):E215-E220.
